package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_splitaftern_two_index_one_cut: `strings.SplitAfterN(..., 2)[1]` instead of a two-part `strings.Cut(...)` flow.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario667Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return len(strings.SplitN(haystack, needle, 2)[0]) >= 0
}
